# Section Templates Library

> Snapshot of pre-built section templates from the UpSolution library (`us.api`) for the **Impreza** theme. Each entry in the per-category files is a ready-to-paste shortcode block.
>
> The records live in per-category files; this page is just the table of contents. The snapshot is license-gated — re-run `scripts/llms/build.php --only=sections` after a us-core upgrade or after a theme library refresh to update it.
